name: paper
description: /paper <args> — arxiv-style LaTeX paper scaffolder. Verbs: new <slug> (scaffold template/ skeleton at ./<slug>/, now ships with a working matplotlib figure example + `make figures` target) · sample <slug> (copy the bundled demiurge sample-nb-bcs-absorbed verbatim, an arxiv-quality reference exhibit) · fig <size> <prompt> <out.png> (delegates to sister `imagine` plugin → fal.ai `openai/gpt-image-2`) · compile [dir] (pdflatex × 3 + bibtex) · list (bundled samples) · help. Template is a minimal arxiv-style single-column 11pt skeleton (main.tex + references.bib + Makefile + README.md + figures/_scripts/fig01_example.py + figures/fig01_example.pdf + figures/_prompts/) — compiles end-to-end out of the box, one figure inlined. `fig` requires the sister `imagine` plugin (also in sidecar marketplace).
